name: STM32U535 WLCSP56 SMPS
description: Generated from the STM32U535 alternate-function workbook and STM32U535CB datasheet for STM32U535 WLCSP56 SMPS. This definition models the WLCSP56 SMPS package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32U535 devices bring TrustZone-enabled ultra-low-power Cortex-M33 routing across compact to mid-size packages with up to 512 Kbytes of flash memory and 274 Kbytes of SRAM. This package definition exposes 44 peripheral blocks covering 9 timers, 3 low-power timers, 5 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 4 I2C controllers, 1 serial audio interface, 1 SDMMC host interface, 1 FDCAN controller, 2 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 1 on-chip operational amplifier, 1 ultra-low-power comparator, a digital camera interface, and 1 USB interface.
